title: calycobolus ferrugineus
intro: Calycobolus ferrugineus, also known as the iron-coloured calycobolus, is a plant species in the family Convolvulaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been reported to exhibit health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Calycobolus ferrugineus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional African medicine.
